hero.heading: Buying in the DR doesn't have to be a leap of faith.
hero.sub: There's no MLS in the Dominican Republic. Listings are scattered across WhatsApp groups, agent sites, and Facebook posts. We built I♥DR Realty so you have one trusted place to start — verified properties, real data, and a team that lives where you're buying.

problem.heading: The DR market is fragmented. Local expertise is the whole difference.
problem.body: Most countries have a central listing service that keeps everyone honest. The DR doesn't. That means the same property can be listed at three different prices, "off-market" deals get passed around between agents, and foreign buyers regularly overpay because they have no way to compare. Working with a team that lives here, sees every new listing, and has a track record you can verify isn't a nice-to-have — it's the entire game.
problem.body_strong: Working with a team that lives here, sees every new listing, and has a track record you can verify isn't a nice-to-have — it's the entire game.

pillars.heading: What you get with I♥DR Realty

items.title: Verified listings only
items.desc: Every property is reviewed by our team before it goes live — photos, price, ownership, the works. No phantom listings, no bait-and-switch.

items.title: Built for international buyers
items.desc: Bilingual ES/EN throughout, USD/DOP toggle, foreign-ownership notes on every listing, and a team that's used to closing deals across time zones.

items.title: Numbers, not vibes
items.desc: ROI calculator, regional yield data, and transparent fees built into every deal page. Decide with the math in front of you, not after.

items.title: Fast, transparent process
items.desc: From first inquiry to title transfer, every step is laid out — what happens, who does it, what it costs. No surprises.

services.heading: What our team actually does for you
services.sub: The right agent wears six hats. Each one matters in a market like the DR.

items.title: Property matchmaker
items.desc: We learn what you're looking for — beach, mountain, rental yield, second home — and only show you properties that fit.

items.title: Skilled negotiator
items.desc: Local pricing knowledge, comparable sales, and seller relationships that get you a fair number — without leaving money on the table.

items.title: Market specialist
items.desc: Deep familiarity with Punta Cana, Cap Cana, Las Terrenas, Santo Domingo, and the rising areas most foreign buyers haven't heard of yet.

items.title: Transaction coordinator
items.desc: Title search, lawyer coordination, escrow, CONFOTUR paperwork, IPI registration — handled, tracked, and explained at every step.

items.title: Trusted advisor
items.desc: We'll tell you when not to buy. Honest feedback is the entire point of having a local in your corner.

items.title: Long-term support
items.desc: After closing: property managers, contractors, banking, residency referrals — the connections you actually need to live or invest here.

process.heading: From first call to keys in hand
process.sub: The whole journey is usually 60–120 days. Here's exactly how it goes.

steps.title: Discovery call
steps.desc: Tell us what you're looking for, your timeline, and how you'd use the property. 30 minutes, no pressure, in English or Spanish.

steps.title: Curated shortlist
steps.desc: We send you 5–10 properties that actually match — with full data, ROI numbers, and our honest take on each one.

steps.title: Property tour
steps.desc: On the island or via live video. We walk through neighborhoods, point out what photos don't show, and answer everything.

steps.title: Offer & negotiation
steps.desc: We help you write a competitive offer and negotiate on your behalf. Most deals close 4–8% under asking.

steps.title: Due diligence
steps.desc: Title search, survey, building inspection, HOA history — coordinated with a Dominican attorney we trust.

steps.title: Closing & handover
steps.desc: Sign at the notary, register at the title office, take the keys. We're with you in the room or on the call.

trust.heading: What working with I♥DR Realty actually means
items: Every listing reviewed and verified before going live
Bilingual team — English, Spanish, and growing
Real ROI numbers on every investment property
Personalized search based on goals, not just budget
Agents who actually live in the markets you're buying in
Connections to attorneys, banks, property managers, contractors
Honest pushback when a deal doesn't make sense

quote.text: "Buying property abroad shouldn't feel like a gamble. It should feel like making an informed decision — with someone in your corner who knows the country, the law, and the market better than you do, and is willing to tell you the truth."
quote.author: — The I♥DR Realty team

cta.heading: Ready to find your place in paradise?
cta.sub: Browse listings or book a 30-minute discovery call — no commitment, no pressure.
